message:
fix(web): use overlay border-radius tokens instead of magic numbers

Overlay.tsx was using hardcoded '16px 16px 0 0' and '8px' values
instead of the semantic tokens --overlay-border-radius-mobile and
--overlay-border-radius that were created in the token audit.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
